title: pittosporum leroyanum
intro: Pittosporum leroyanum is a species of flowering plant in the family Pittosporaceae, commonly known as the New Caledonian yellow-wood. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pittosporum leroyanum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and soothe digestive issues. Pittosporum leroyanum can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
